Prasad Kolte

Bakery & Pastry Chef

Crafting breads, cakes, pastries and creative desserts with premium quality and a family-rooted love for baking.

View my work Get in touch
ChefPrasad KolteDelhi · India

01 — About Me

A passion baked in from the start.

I'm a passionate bakery and pastry enthusiast with a strong interest in creating high-quality baked products. Coming from a family bakery business, baking has been part of my life for as long as I can remember.

I'm continuously improving my skills through professional bakery training, and I love working on breads, cakes, pastries, and creative desserts — always chasing better flavour, texture and finish.

"I aspire to establish my own bakery brand — known for its premium quality, innovation, and an exceptional customer experience."

That goal guides every loaf I shape and every dessert I plate. Each bake is a step toward building something of my own.

04 — Projects & Products

Signature creations.

A selection of my recent work — from everyday bakes to fine-dining plated desserts.

Oreo Cheesecake Cupcakes

Creaming · Cream-cheese frosting

Cookies-and-cream cupcakes with a piped cheesecake centre, chocolate drizzle and a whole Oreo on top.

Fresh Fruit Drip Cake

Buttercream · Ganache drip

Clean cream-finished cake with a chocolate drip and a crown of fresh seasonal fruit.

Chocolate Walnut Entremet

Mousse · Glazing · Chocolate collar

Layered chocolate mousse cake with a mirror sheen, caramelised walnuts and a chocolate collar.

Chocolate Showpiece

Tempering · Sculpting

Hand-sculpted tempered-chocolate showpiece created during my diploma at the School of Bakery & Culinary Arts.

Mango Plated Dessert

Mousse · Tuile · Plating

Mango mousse dome with coconut, mango compote and a delicate chocolate lace tuile.

Pistachio Plated Dessert

Quenelle · Spheres · Plating

Fine-dining plate of pistachio parfait quenelles with saffron and burst fruit spheres.

Opera Cake

Joconde · Coffee buttercream · Ganache

Classic French opera — thin almond joconde soaked in coffee syrup, layered with coffee buttercream and chocolate ganache, finished with macarons.

Festive Fondant Cupcakes

Fondant modelling · Hand-painting

Hand-modelled fondant toppers for festive themes — Diwali diyas, characters and seasonal designs, each sculpted by hand.

Carrot Cake Cupcakes

Cream cheese · Streusel · Dried pineapple

Spiced carrot cupcakes with cream-cheese frosting, a walnut streusel crust and a dried-pineapple flower.

05 — Work Experience

Raised in a family bakery.

Family Bakery Business

Baker & production support

Responsibilities

  • Assisting daily bakery production, from mixing and proofing to baking and finishing.
  • Preparing breads, cakes and pastries to meet customer orders and quality standards.
  • Maintaining cleanliness, food safety and hygiene across the kitchen.
  • Handling customer orders and understanding what keeps them coming back.

Skills Gained

What the bakery taught me
  • Working under real deadlines and managing production volume.
  • Consistency — delivering the same quality batch after batch.
  • An eye for presentation, finishing and customer experience.
  • Discipline, hygiene standards and teamwork in a live kitchen.

08 — Future Goals

Where this is headed.

"My vision is to build BakeVerse — a bakery brand that's premium in quality, innovative in ideas, and unforgettable in experience. From oven to heart."

BakeVerse is the brand I'm working toward: a space where every product is made with care and craft, from everyday breads to signature celebration pieces — a bakery people trust and return to.

Products I want to specialise in

Artisan breads Celebration cakes Viennoiserie Premium pastries Chocolate & pralines Plated desserts Custom fondant work
